scripts.postbuild: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path');const s=p.resolve('.','.htaccess');const d=p.resolve('.','out','.htaccess');if(fs.existsSync(s)&&fs.existsSync('out')){fs.copyFileSync(s,d);console.log('Copied .htaccess to ./out');}else{console.log('Skipped .htaccess copy (missing source or out)');}"
